product_overview: ArchFlow ERP is a specialized project and client management platform for architecture firms, designed to centralize client relationships, architectural project workflows, activities, time tracking, and financial visibility. The product focuses on productivity, traceability, and business intelligence for architects and design offices.
core_goals: Centralize client, project, and activity management in one architecture-focused ERP
Provide secure authentication and session management for office users
Support architectural project workflows including phases, deliverables, and task progression
Enable detailed activity tracking and time logging for productivity analysis
Deliver financial summaries and project profitability visibility
Maintain auditability and soft-delete behavior for operational traceability

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in, sign out, and manage their current session securely.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with authenticated session/JWT -> Access protected app routes with active session -> Receive authenticated user context
POST /api/auth/callback/credentials with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> Stay unauthenticated and block protected access
POST /api/auth/signout with authenticated session -> Receive 200 confirmation -> Session is cleared -> Further protected requests require login

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Create and retrieve client records for architectural relationships, including filtered listing and record creation.
user_flows: GET /app/actions/client.ts (getClients) with valid auth and optional filters -> Receive 200 with client list -> Display clients in dashboard table
POST /app/actions/client.ts (createClient) with valid client data -> Receive 200 with created client record -> Client becomes available in listings and detail views
GET /app/actions/client.ts (getClients) without authentication -> Receive 401 or access denied -> No client data is returned
POST /app/actions/client.ts (createClient) with missing required fields or duplicate document/email -> Receive validation error response -> Client record is not created

features.name: Project Management
features.description: Manage architectural projects, including creation and listing of projects with architectural workflow context.
user_flows: POST /app/actions/project.ts (createProject) with valid project and client data -> Receive 200 with created project -> Project appears in project list and dashboard metrics
GET /app/actions/project.ts (getProjects) with authenticated user -> Receive 200 with project collection -> Render list or Kanban view of projects
POST /app/actions/project.ts (createProject) with invalid dates, missing client, or invalid architectural fields -> Receive validation error response -> Project is not created
GET /app/actions/project.ts (getProjects) without authentication -> Receive 401 or access denied -> No project data is returned

features.name: Kanban & Tasks
features.description: Display project work items in a Kanban-style board with cards, lists, and task positions for project progression.
user_flows: GET /app/actions/kanban.ts (getKanbanBoard) with valid project context -> Receive 200 with lists, tasks, and card positions -> Render Kanban board for the project
GET /app/actions/kanban.ts (getKanbanBoard) for an unauthorized or inaccessible project -> Receive 403 forbidden or 404 not found -> No board data is shown
GET /app/actions/kanban.ts (getKanbanBoard) with missing project identifier -> Receive validation error response -> Board request is rejected

features.name: Time Tracking
features.description: Log work hours against projects and tasks to support productivity and billing analysis.
user_flows: POST /app/actions/timeLog.ts (logTime) with valid project, task, duration, and category -> Receive 200 with saved time log -> Hours are included in timesheet and project metrics
POST /app/actions/timeLog.ts (logTime) with duration <= 0 or missing required project context -> Receive validation error response -> Time log is not saved
POST /app/actions/timeLog.ts (logTime) without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> No time entry is recorded

features.name: Finance Management
features.description: Retrieve project-level financial summaries covering income, expenses, and cash flow.
user_flows: GET /app/actions/finance.ts (getFinancialSummary) with authenticated user and valid project -> Receive 200 with income, expenses, and cash flow data -> Display finance dashboard for the project
GET /app/actions/finance.ts (getFinancialSummary) for a project the user cannot access -> Receive 403 forbidden or 404 not found -> No financial summary is exposed
GET /app/actions/finance.ts (getFinancialSummary) without authentication -> Receive 401 unauthorized response -> Financial data is not returned
